title.en: Time passed slowly, and the killings began to i...

content.en:
Time passed slowly, and the killings began to increase in number.

Even between the Extreme Path creatures and the Extreme Path creatures, they will kill.

After all, there are only a few super-perfect controllers at the end of the world, and if you want to enter the killing list, you naturally have to fight each other.

Anyway, there is no shortage of super-level perfect controllers in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, if you sacrifice most of the super-perfect controllers and Extreme Dao creatures and cultivate some Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace feels very good.

The Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace doesn't care about the lives of those weak Extreme Path creatures.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian has killed a lot of extreme creatures, and his ranking on the killing list has entered the top ten.

And the end of the realm this time entered the super perfect controller of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, only Ye Tian entered the top ten, and the others all belonged to the extreme path creatures.

......

"Endless Lord has made it to the top 10 kills!!!"

The Lord of the Ancients was surprised.

In fact, he didn't know what level of Ye Tian's current strength had reached, he only knew that Ye Tian was very powerful, and he was almost invincible among the super-level perfect controllers at the end of the realm, maybe there were some super-level perfect controllers who could be comparable to Ye Tian, but they would definitely not be able to defeat Ye Tian.

Such strength, isn't it almost invincible?

But now, where can this be described as almost invincible!

You must know that even if the super-perfect controller of the end of the realm is very strong, it will be difficult to survive in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, because it will be surrounded, and once its whereabouts are exposed, a bunch of extreme creatures will be used.

And the Extreme Creatures that can enter the top ten of the killing list almost all have a bunch of minions, and there are many of them, and all the killing is carried out by their masters, and the purpose of the minions is to find other super-perfect masters.

Therefore, with the help of minions, these extreme creatures can make it to the top ten.

And Ye Tian, the Lord of Endless, naturally does not have the help of other super-perfect controllers, relying on himself, in such a situation, Ye Tian can still enter the top ten of the killing list, what a demon this is!

"As long as you can stay in the top 10 on the kill list, this is a broken record!"

The Lord of the Ancient said excitedly.

At the same time, the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the Edge of the Realm were also shocked, and even the Lord of the White Night showed a hint of surprise, of course, that's all.

After all, the Extreme Dao Genius War is not over yet, and Ye Tian's ability to reach the top ten on the killing list can only prove that his strength is very strong and his luck is very good, such as not encountering the siege of powerful Extreme Dao creatures and a large number of Extreme Dao creatures, nothing else can be said.

If Ye Tian could still remain in the top ten on the killing list at the end of the Extreme Dao Genius Battle, it would be enough to surprise him.

Of course.

Even so, Ye Tian's fame had risen again, attracting the attention of those who were in perfect control of the Extreme Realm.

......

Extreme deep sea.

Some of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace's Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were also watching the killing list.

In the past, from the beginning, the top ten on the killing list belonged to the Extreme Path creatures on this side of the Extreme Deep Sea, but this time, the super perfect controllers of the Source of the Realm entered the top ten.

This incident upset them!

"Contact the Extreme Dao creatures of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, find the Endless Lord at the end of the realm, and kill him!"

A big man from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace gave the order.

Suddenly, the order was conveyed.

Although it is difficult to contact the Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Mangshan Realm, it is still possible.

Not long after, the Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Mangshan Realm were instructed by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace to start looking for Ye Tian.

Somewhere in the Extreme Mangshan Realm.

A group of Extreme Dao creatures were killed, and soon several Extreme Dao creatures with extremely terrifying breaths came, and they belonged to the Extreme Dao Corps under the command of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

The Extreme Creatures who are qualified to enter the Extreme Dao Corps are all very powerful in combat.

And they can all crush other super-perfect controllers, and their strength is very strong.

Not only that, but they also carried the hole cards given by the top management of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Among these Extreme Path creatures, the leader is the Lord of the Crows, who ranks at the peak of the super-level perfect master, can instantly kill the powerful super-level perfect master, and is also a top powerhouse who is qualified to enter the killing list.

At this time, the Lord of the Ravens took out a token, "According to the distress summons, they have discovered the Endless Lord of the Realm, but they can't escape. The token in my hand is a secret treasure of cause and effect given by Lord Yunlu, and it carries the power of Lord Yunlu's Extreme Path of Cause and Effect. Only by using the power of the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect can he lock the position of the other party through the relationship between cause and effect, even if he is the perfect controller of the True Realm, it will be difficult to get rid of the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect of Lord Yunlu. "

"Yes, that Endless Lord is dead, and he dares to massacre a large number of our Extreme Creatures in the Extreme Deep Sea, it's just looking for death!"

"Yes, we can fight among ourselves, but if the cultivators at the end of the realm dare to kill us, they are the common enemy!"

"Find him first! The above can give great benefits, as long as you kill him, then we will be rich!"

"However, the strength of the Endless Lord is very strong, according to the news conveyed by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, he has entered the top ten of the killing list, and several of us are definitely not opponents, so we must cooperate with other Extreme Path creatures to besiege the Endless Lord in sufficient numbers. "

Subsequently.

These Arctic creatures began to connect with other Arctic creatures.

In a short time, a large number of extreme creatures gathered.

......

Extreme Mang Mountain Boundary, somewhere.

Ye Tian had just found some good things and was about to go to other places, when suddenly an inexplicable force locked him from an endless and distant place.

This power is no stranger to Ye Tian.

"Cause and Effect Extreme!"

Ye Tian frowned, he naturally comprehended the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect, but it was only the beginning, and although the power of this Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect was only a trace, it was too powerful.

"The Ultimate Path of Cause and Effect in the Perfection Realm!"

Ye Tian guessed.

This kind of karma is locked on him, and he can't break it.

Unless he has also comprehended the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect of the Perfection Realm, or a special Extreme Path of Cause and Effect Treasure, he can block the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect Lock.

"Among the Extreme Dao creatures here, there should not be a super-level perfect controller of the Extreme Dao Creature who has comprehended the Extreme Dao of Cause and Effect Extreme, it should be some kind of treasure, or it should carry the power of the Extreme Dao Extreme Dao of a certain Extreme Realm Perfect Controller!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now that he is locked, I am afraid that there will soon be a lot of extreme creatures to surround him.

Of course, if he killed the Extreme Creature that locked him, he wouldn't be locked out.

"It's a good thing that a lot of Extreme Creatures are coming to attack me, and I don't need to spend time looking for them. If you kill them all, you can get the countless treasures they have found over the years, which is definitely a great harvest!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

So, he waited here for the arrival of those extreme creatures.
